officials.name: Sir Walter Egerton
officials.position: Governor and Commander-in-Chief; also High Commissioner of Southern Nigeria
officials.allowances: 1,000l. duty allowance, chargeable, half to Lagos and half to Southern Nigeria

officials.name: S. I. de Souza
officials.position: Confidential Clerk and Clerk of the Legislative Council

officials.name: S. J. Hood
officials.position: Collector of Customs, Shipping Master, Registrar of Shipping, and Receiver of Wrecks

officials.name: J. C. Foreythe
officials.position: Keeper of King's Warehouse and Wharves

officials.name: H. Macaulay
officials.position: 4th Class Clerk and Clerk to the Chief Justice

officials.name: S. A. Pratt
officials.position: Registrar of Instruments affecting Lands, and of Marriages

officials.name: E. P. Cotton
officials.position: Commissioner of Lands and Colonial Surveyor
